name: Bouncing Bonny
description: Legendary DAHL grenade mod from Borderlands 2. Acts like a bouncing betty: it ricochets and scatters multiple child grenades across a wide area, letting it blanket groups and clear clustered spawns. The bullet-like spray from the main grenade will not hit allies, but the child explosions can still catch you if you are too close.
notes: Has a near-equivalent Seraph variant, the Crossfire. With matching parts, Bouncing Bonny tends to show slightly higher damage and a shorter listed fuse, but releases its child grenades a little more slowly. Its red text nods to the old ballad The Twa Sisters. Can also be obtained via certain SHiFT code rewards.

special.description: Sends out a child grenade in a random direction every 2.5 seconds. Red text: Your sister is such a bitch. Boosts damage and blast radius, shortens fuse, and spawns extra child grenades on each bounce, bouncing-betty style.
special.title: Your sister is such a bitch.
